name: PR fetcher does not advance the cursor when a batch fails so the next run can re-attempt from the same point
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors && printf '{"last_pr_number":5}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors/cfpb-consumerfinance.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub /nonexistent/file --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'last_pr_number":5' .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/cursors/cfpb-consumerfinance.json && echo preserved 1>&2
